files.patch:
@@ -10,6 +10,8 @@
   with `--root changelog` so they operate on the dogfooded data and refresh
   those files alongside root docs (`README.md`, `DOCUMENTATION.md`,
   `DEVELOPMENT.md`) when behavior changes.
+- Create new entries with `uv run tenzir-changelog --root changelog add ...`; do
+  not hand-write changelog entry files.
 - `tests/` stores pytest suites that exercise flows with `CliRunner`; mirror
   module names (e.g., `test_cli.py`) and keep fixtures close to usage.

@@ -0,0 +1,9 @@
+---
+title: Store entry creation dates as Date objects
+type: change
+authors:
+- codex
+created: 2025-10-21
+---
+
+Entry parsing now converts `created` metadata to real dates and emits them for consumers.

@@ -1,11 +0,0 @@
----
-title: Store entry creation dates as Date objects
-type: change
-authors:
-- codex
-created: 2025-10-21
----
-
-Entry parsing now converts `created` metadata to real `datetime.date` objects and
-persists them when writing entries, ensuring downstream consumers receive typed
-values instead of plain strings.
